original: Pyrite Heavy industries isn't typically in the weapons manufacturing business, but they're not above taking an existing firearm from another corporation, stamping their own logo over it, and stuffing it full of aftermarket mods to make it punch a little harder, durability be damned.
context: <<POS:06063649>> SC115 Laser Pistol",e.tooltip="Pyrite Heavy industries isn't typically in the weapons manuf"
